decisions.title_en: Anthropic weighs new round at $900B+ valuation, on track to surpass OpenAI
decisions.reason: story_key not seen in 7-day lookback. Net new development: Anthropic considering offers above $900B vs. OpenAI's most recent ~$850B valuation; would be first time an AI lab is more valuable than OpenAI.

decisions.title_en: Alphabet Q1 2026 crushes estimates: Cloud +63%, $460B backlog, raises capex to $190B
decisions.reason: story_key not seen in lookback. Q1 2026 earnings reported April 29; revenue $109.9B, Cloud revenue $20.03B (+63%), backlog ~$460B, capex guide raised to $180-190B, Pichai said 'we are compute constrained'.

decisions.title_en: Microsoft Q3 FY26: Azure +40%, Copilot 20M paid seats, capex jumps to $190B on memory prices
decisions.reason: story_key not seen in lookback. Microsoft FY26 Q3 reported April 29; revenue $82.9B, Azure +40% (above 37-38% guide), capex now $190B FY-wide due to memory cost surge, 20M Copilot paid seats, capacity-constrained.

decisions.title_en: Amazon Q1: AWS +28% (3-yr high), in-house chip business hits $20B run-rate, Bedrock tokens up 170% QoQ
decisions.reason: story_key not seen in lookback. Q1 2026 reported April 29; revenue $181.5B, AWS $37.59B +28% (fastest in 3+ years), in-house silicon (Trainium/Graviton/Nitro) at $20B+ run-rate at triple-digit growth, capex $44.2B.

decisions.title_en: Meta Q1 2026: revenue beats, capex raised to $125-145B, but DAP miss + Llama still last drag stock -7% AH
decisions.reason: story_key not seen in lookback. Q1 2026 reported April 29; revenue $56.31B beat, EPS $7.31 beat, but capex guide raised to $125-145B and stock dropped ~7% after-hours on DAP miss + Llama still ranking last among major US labs.

decisions.title_en: Musk v. Altman Day 3: Musk calls Microsoft $10B investment 'bait-and-switch', predicts AI smarter than human in 2027, Brockman put on 48-hour notice
decisions.reason: story_key seen in lookback on 04-23, 04-25, 04-27, 04-28. Substantively new info on Day 3 (Apr 29): Musk's heated cross-examination by Bill Savitt, the explicit 'bait-and-switch' framing of Microsoft's $10B investment, Musk's courtroom prediction that AI will be smarter than any human as soon as 2027, scheduling of Birchall (Musk family-office head) as next witness, Brockman put on 48-hour notice for Friday testimony.
